query: What demand charges apply to commercial customers with demand >500 kW in California, within PG&E's territory, based on the OpenEI tariffs data? Answer should contain service class name and demand charge for at least 2 classes
final_answer:
Based on the **OpenEI IURDB** data for **Pacific Gas & Electric Co (EIA ID 14328)**, the active commercial tariffs applicable to customers with demand **greater than 500 kW** are the **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU** schedules. Here are two service classes and their demand charges:

| Service Class Name | Demand Charge |
|---|---|
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Secondary)** | Flat demand charge up to **$42.10/kW**, plus a time-of-use demand charge up to **$21.59/kW** |
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Primary)** | Flat demand charge up to **$33.10/kW**, plus a time-of-use demand charge up to **$18.71/kW** |

For reference, the **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Transmission)** class has a flat demand charge of **$16.47/kW** and no additional TOU demand charge in the currently active record.

**Source:** OpenEI Utility Rate Database (IURDB), Pacific Gas & Electric Co commercial tariffs, EIA ID 14328, active tariffs retrieved via the OpenEI API.

{"label":"69de7e5220aaf9dd060cab5d","approved":true,"is_default":false,"utility":"Pacific Gas & Electric Co","eiaid":14328,"name":"E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Secondary, Voluntary)","startdate":1774594800,"sector":"Commercial","servicetype":"Bundled","demandunits":"kW","flatdemandunit":"kW","flatdemandstructure":[[{"rate":42.1}],[{"rate":42.1}]],"demandrateunit":"kW","demandratestructure":[[{"rate":0}],[{"rate":0}],[{"rate":16.44}],[{"rate":21.59}]],"energyratestructure":[[{"unit":"kWh","rate":0.12235}],[{"unit":"kWh","rate":0.123}],[{"unit":"kWh","rate":0.12538}],[{"unit":"kWh","rate":0.13087}],[{"unit":"kWh","rate":0.13087}]],"fixedchargefirstmeter":11.36882,"fixedchargeunits":"$/day"}
]'''

data = json.loads(raw)

def summarize(t):
    name = t['name']
    start = datetime.utcfromtimestamp(t['startdate']).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    fd = t.get('flatdemandstructure')
    dr = t.get('demandratestructure')
    units = t.get('demandunits','kW')
    # Peak/max demand charge component
    max_demand = None
    if dr:
        max_demand = max((x['rate'] for row in dr for x in row), default=None)
    # Flat demand (customer charge based on max demand) if any
    flat_max = None
    if fd:
        flat_max = max((x['rate'] for row in fd for x in row), default=None)
    return {
        'name': name,
        'start': start,
        'units': units,
        'max_TOU_demand_rate_$/kW': max_demand,
        'flat_demand_max_$/kW': flat_max,
        'fixed_charge': t.get('fixedchargefirstmeter'),
        'fixed_charge_units': t.get('fixedchargeunits')
    }

for s in [summarize(t) for t in data]:
    print(s)

Based on the **OpenEI IURDB** data for **Pacific Gas & Electric Co (EIA ID 14328)**, the active commercial tariffs applicable to customers with demand **greater than 500 kW** are the **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU** schedules. Here are two service classes and their demand charges:

| Service Class Name | Demand Charge |
|---|---|
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Secondary)** | Flat demand charge up to **$42.10/kW**, plus a time-of-use demand charge up to **$21.59/kW** |
| **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Primary)** | Flat demand charge up to **$33.10/kW**, plus a time-of-use demand charge up to **$18.71/kW** |

For reference, the **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Transmission)** class has a flat demand charge of **$16.47/kW** and no additional TOU demand charge in the currently active record.

**Source:** OpenEI Utility Rate Database (IURDB), Pacific Gas & Electric Co commercial tariffs, EIA ID 14328, active tariffs retrieved via the OpenEI API.

- **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Secondary)**: flat demand charge up to **$42.10/kW**, plus TOU demand charge up to **$21.59/kW**.
- **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Primary)**: flat demand charge up to **$33.10/kW**, plus TOU demand charge up to **$18.71/kW**.
- **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Transmission)**: flat demand charge **$16.47/kW**, with no additional TOU demand charge in the active record.
